name: maestro
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the Maestro multi-agent orchestration plugin.

plugins.name: maestro
plugins.description: Maestro Frontier: an opt-in, zero-dependency local multi-CLI fusion engine for AI coding agents. Fan a prompt out to the model CLIs on your machine (Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro), have Opus 4.8 judge the answers into a structured analysis, then write a grounded synthesis — off/single/fusion modes via /maestro:frontier. Built on Maestro's research-grounded orchestration discipline: decision-gated multi-agent routing, verified done-claims, surgical scope, and structural enforcement hooks (123 A/B benchmark runs, 6 tested hooks).
